memoryArtifacts.headline: Discovery of America by a welsh prince
memoryArtifacts.description:
The discovery of America… by a Welsh Prince?

by Ben Johnson

In fourteen hundred and ninety-two
Columbus sailed the ocean blue.

Whilst it was generally believed that Columbus was the first European …

popularStory.headline: Madog ap Maredudd
popularStory.description:
Madog ap Maredudd (Middle Welsh: Madawg mab Maredud, Madawc mab Maredut; died 1160) was the last Prince of the entire Kingdom of Powys, Wales and for a time held the Fitzalan Lordship of Oswestry.
Ma …

zh.lifeSummary: 當King Madog of Powys於1091年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys44歲，母親Hunedd ferch Einudd29歲。他於1120年與Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1141年登記服兵役。他去世於1160年2月9日在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆享年69歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯波斯梅福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Madog of Powys于1091年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys44岁，母亲Hunedd ferch Einudd29岁。他于1120年与Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1141年登记服兵役。他去世于1160年2月9日在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆享年69岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯波斯梅福德。

nameMeanings.name: King
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word for a male monarch, bestowed, especially in America, with a hint of the notion that the bearer would have kingly qualities;  compare  Duke   and   Earl .  In some cases it may be a transferred use of the surname (originally a nickname or an occupational name given to someone who was employed in a royal household). Its frequency among African Americans is no doubt partly attributable to the civil rights leader  Martin Luther King  (  1929–68 ). It is also used as a short form of   Kingsley .

variants.name: Kingsley
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name derived from various places (in Cheshire, Hampshire, Staffordshire) named in Old English as Cyningeslēah ‘king's wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Powys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Powis
meanings: Welsh (now mainly West Midlands of England): habitational name from the region of Powis in mid Wales (from Old Welsh powes ‘country dwellers’).

en.lifeSummary: When King Madog of Powys was born in 1091, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys, was 44 and his mother, Hunedd ferch Einudd, was 29. He married Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales in 1120, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1141. He died on 9 February 1160, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Meifod, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Meifod, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom: Meifod, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Madog of Powys est né en 1091, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Hunedd ferch Einudd, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales en 1120, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1141. Il est décédé le 9 février 1160, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Meifod, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Madog of Powys 1091 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys 44 und seine Mutter Hunedd ferch Einudd 29. Er hat 1120 in Wales, United Kingdom Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1141 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. Februar 1160 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Meifod, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Madog of Powys è nato il nel 1091 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Hunedd ferch Einudd, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales nel 1120, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1141. Morì il 9 febbraio 1160, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Meifod, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: King Madog of Powysが1091年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powysは44歳，母Hunedd ferch Einuddは29歳であった。1120年にイギリスウェールズでSusanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Walesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1141年に兵役登録をした。彼は1160年2月9日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで69歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズポウイスメイフォドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Madog of Powys(이)가 1091년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Hunedd ferch Einudd(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1120년 영국 웨일스에서 Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1141년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1160년 2월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 파우이스 이포드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Madog of Powys nasceu em 1091, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Hunedd ferch Einudd, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales em 1120, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1141. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1160, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Meifod, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom.

ro.Meifod, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom: Meifod, Powys, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Madog of Powys родился в 1091 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Hunedd ferch Einudd, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales в 1120 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1141 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 февраля 1160 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности мифод, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Madog of Powys nació en 1091, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Maredudd ap Bleddyn Prince of Powys, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Hunedd ferch Einudd, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales en 1120, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1141. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1160, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Meifod, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido.
